case_title: APPAREL CLEAN INDUSTRIAL VS. EXCHANGE BARBER SHOP

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 2/5/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,301.00 FILED BY APPAREL CLEAN INDUSTRIAL AS TO DEFENDANT EXCHANGE BARBER SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE - CIVIL SERVICE DATE OCT-16-2018 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF APPAREL CLEAN INDUSTRIAL AS TO DEFENDANT EXCHANGE BARBER SHOP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JAN-08-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APPAREL CLEAN INDUSTRIAL IS PRESENT MARK BICHSEL, OWNER. DEFENDANT EXCHANGE BARBER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY EVELYN CONNELL, OWNER AND RACHID SARDI, BARBER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APPAREL CLEAN INDUSTRIAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APPAREL CLEAN INDUSTRIAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXCHANGE BARBER SHOP $527.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $577.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $527 FOR OUTSTANDING INVOICES. THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT TERMINATED THE CONTRACT EFFECTIVE 6/30/18. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
